title: AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations
tagline: The 4D framework for working well with AI — Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence.
description: The foundational track of the School of AI Fluency. One module per D. Works for students, educators, workers, and nonprofit operators — everyone who needs to collaborate with AI intentionally instead of reactively. Capstone: a one-page personal AI Fluency playbook you actually use.
